description_long: This object is a stylized bottle cap, featuring a scalloped edge and a metallic gold finish. The front face is decorated with a colorful design, including a red Coca-Cola bottle, the number '200', and the phrase 'GIVE THE FEELING', all set against a green background with red and gold stars. The reverse side displays the classic Coca-Cola logo in red on a gold background. The cap is relatively flat and circular, with a thickness typical of a metal bottle cap. The surface appears glossy and reflective, with no visible signs of wear or damage. The object is likely made of metal, commonly used for beverage bottle caps, and is not designed to hold liquid itself.
description: A decorative, metallic Coca-Cola bottle cap with colorful branding and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin, scalloped metallic edge of the cap.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the colorful Coca-Cola branding, bottle graphic, and '200' text.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin, scalloped metallic edge.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the red Coca-Cola logo on a gold background.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front: 'GIVE THE FEELING', '200', Coca-Cola bottle graphic, stars; Back: red Coca-Cola logo. Branding is colorful and prominent on both sides.
